source.reference: 14.5x114mm B-32 990gr mild steel core API ball. G7 BC~0.420. Soviet/Russian heavy machine gun round (KPVT). Velocity ~976 m/s.
source.methodology: Values based on commonly published historical ballistics data for this military cartridge.

notes: Chamber pressure: 360 MPa. 14.5x114mm Soviet heavy machine gun/anti-materiel cartridge.
